name: Recurring Item Exception

eligibility.description: The item must be recurring in nature, not material (or result in better matching), and the all-events test must be met by year-end.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows accrual-method taxpayers to deduct expenses in the year the 'all events' test is met if economic performance occurs within 8.5 months after year-end.
